children.heading: Civil penalty for frivolous tax returns
children.label: a Civil penalty for frivolous tax returns
A
children.text: does not contain information on which the substantial correctness of the self-assessment may be judged, or

children.label: B
children.text: contains information that on its face indicates that the self-assessment is substantially incorrect, and

children.label: A
children.text: is based on a position which the Secretary has identified as frivolous under subsection (c), or

children.label: B
children.text: reflects a desire to delay or impede the administration of Federal tax laws.

children.heading: Civil penalty for specified frivolous submissions
children.label: b Civil penalty for specified frivolous submissions

children.heading: Imposition of penalty
children.label: 1 Imposition of penalty
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (3), any person who submits a specified frivolous submission shall pay a penalty of $5,000.

children.label: i
children.text: is based on a position which the Secretary has identified as frivolous under subsection (c), or

children.label: ii
children.text: reflects a desire to delay or impede the administration of Federal tax laws.

children.label: I
children.text: section 6320 (relating to notice and opportunity for hearing upon filing of notice of lien), or

children.label: II
children.text: section 6330 (relating to notice and opportunity for hearing before levy), and

children.label: I
children.text: section 6159 (relating to agreements for payment of tax liability in installments),

children.heading: Opportunity to withdraw submission
children.label: 3 Opportunity to withdraw submission
children.text: If the Secretary provides a person with notice that a submission is a specified frivolous submission and such person withdraws such submission within 30 days after such notice, the penalty imposed under paragraph (1) shall not apply with respect to such submission.

children.heading: Listing of frivolous positions
children.label: c Listing of frivolous positions
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe (and periodically revise) a list of positions which the Secretary has identified as being frivolous for purposes of this subsection. The Secretary shall not include in such list any position that the Secretary determines meets the requirement of section 6662(d)(2)(B)(ii)(II).

children.heading: Reduction of penalty
children.label: d Reduction of penalty
children.text: The Secretary may reduce the amount of any penalty imposed under this section if the Secretary determines that such reduction would promote compliance with and administration of the Federal tax laws.

children.heading: Penalties in addition to other penalties
children.label: e Penalties in addition to other penalties
children.text: The penalties imposed by this section shall be in addition to any other penalty provided by law.

children.heading: Partnership adjustments
children.label: f Partnership adjustments
children.text: An administrative adjustment request under section 6227 and a partnership adjustment tracking report under section 6226(b)(4)(A) shall be treated as a return for purposes of this section.
